title: heuchera villosa var. macrorhiza
intro: Heuchera villosa var. macrorhiza, also known as coral bells or mountain coral bells, is a plant species in the heuchera family, characterized by its maple-like leaves and tall spikes of airy flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Heuchera villosa var. macrorhiza include relief from skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
